parameters.jsCode:
const { newContacts } = items[0].json;
return newContacts.map(c => ({
  json: {
    'Phone Number': String(c['Mobile Phone Number'] || c['C'] || '').trim(),
    'Status': '',
    'Answered In Slot': '',
    '8am-10am': '',
    '10am-12pm': '',
    '12pm-2pm': '',
    '2pm-4pm': '',
    '4pm-6pm': '',
    'Total Attempts': '',
    'Last Call ID': '',
    'Last Duration (s)': '',
    'Last Transcript': '',
    'Last Classification': '',
    'Last Called At': '',
    'Recording URL': '',
    'Answered At': ''
  }
}));

// Take only the first item from poll response
return [items[0]];

parameters.text:
=You are a call classification engine. An AI assistant called a phone number and the transcript below was captured via speech-to-text. Classify the call as EXACTLY one of these five values:
- Human Answered
- Voicemail
- Call Screening
- IVR
- No Answer

CRITICAL RULES (check these first, before reading the transcript):
- If call duration is 0 OR the transcript is empty or blank → No Answer. No exceptions.
- If endedReason contains "no-answer", "busy", "failed", "canceled", "error", or "timeout" → No Answer.

DEFINITIONS:

Human Answered
A real live person picked up and spoke. Includes: hello, hi, yeah, who is this, I'm here, yes, speaking, any natural conversational response. If a real person is on the line — even briefly — it is Human Answered.

Voicemail
The call reached a voicemail box. Includes:
- Personal outgoing greetings ("Hi this is John, I can't take your call, please leave a message")
- Carrier/automated prompts ("The person you are trying to reach is not available. At the tone please record your message")
- Reading back a phone number then asking to leave a message (automated voice messaging systems)
- Phrases like: leave a message, leave your name and number, at the tone, after the beep, voice mail, voice messaging system, can't take your call, not available to take your call, I'm unavailable, sorry I missed your call, mailbox
- Uninitialized voicemail: "the person you called has a voice mailbox that hasn't been set up yet"
NOTE: Speech-to-text mangles words. "Automated" may appear as "Mated" or "tomated". "Powered by Google" may appear as "Polysis by Google". Read for meaning, not exact words.

Call Screening
A service or person screening the call before connecting. Includes:
- Google/iPhone call screening: "recording this call", "I'll see if this person is available", "can I ask what you're calling about"
- Human screener: "who is calling", "may I ask who is calling", "what is this regarding"

IVR
A fully automated phone system with no human involved. Includes:
- Business/school phone menus: "press 1 for sales", "if you know your party's extension", "dial it at any time"
- Carrier intercepts reading back digits: "seven three two is not available" (the number itself being read aloud as a carrier message)
- Disconnected/invalid numbers: "the number you have dialed", "not in service", "this number has been disconnected"

No Answer
The call was not answered. Includes:
- Duration is 0 seconds
- Empty or blank transcript
- Call ended before anyone or anything responded
- endedReason indicates the call never connected

CONTEXT SIGNALS:
endedReason: {{ $json.endedReason }}
Call duration (seconds): {{ $json.duration }}

TRANSCRIPT:
{{ $json.transcriptText }}

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Respond with exactly this structure and nothing else:
Last Classification: [classification]

Where [classification] is exactly one of:
Human Answered | Voicemail | Call Screening | IVR | No Answer
